prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.9 kg; Height 182.2 cm; BMI 31.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.6%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 296mg/dL; 9 months ago 280mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 269mg/dL; current 183mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 108.9kg; 9 months ago 106.2kg; 6 months ago 104.9kg; 3 months ago 107.3kg; current 105.9kg), Height (12 months ago 182.2cm; 9 months ago 182.2cm; 6 months ago 182.2cm; 3 months ago 182.2cm; current 182.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 31.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 31U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 158mg/g; 9 months ago 124mg/g; 6 months ago 133mg/g; 3 months ago 144mg/g; current 175mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.67 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
